full_suite.failure_notes: 18 failures reflect existing IMG1605/evaluation fixture drift in the dirty workspace; 8 are sandbox-denied TCP/Unix socket binds in review-server and persistent-worker tests. A HEAD archive reproduced representative failures, but not every failure with the exact same prerequisite/state, so they cannot honestly all be marked proven pre-existing.

honest_issues: The preregistered accuracy target was missed: every frozen venue remained effectively unchanged, so no lever is selected for promotion.
The wide suite is not green, and all 26 failures were not proven pre-existing under identical conditions.
The detector retains one locally ranked band per profile; the joint assignment stage cannot recover a true band discarded during candidate formation.
The optional hybrid deduplication path preserves the longest geometry rather than fusing subpixel centers.
The shadow-removal arm was not added because no separately measured shadow stratum established the required trigger.
The implementation remains default-OFF, preview-band, unwired, and VERIFIED=0.
next: Do not promote or wire this arm. If court work continues, preregister a multi-band seed-guided detector against the same frozen venues without changing solver or weights, then rerun identical gates.
